name: ml-ops-engineer
description: > Expert MLOps engineering covering model deployment, ML pipelines, model monitoring, feature stores, and infrastructure automation. Use when deploying models to production, building training pipelines, setting up drift detection, configuring feature stores, or automating ML CI/CD workflows.
author: borghei
summary_zh: 一个面向机器学习工程化的专家助手，帮你把模型部署上线、搭建训练流水线、监控模型漂移、配置特征存储，以及打通 ML 的 CI/CD 自动化流程，适合需要把模型推向生产环境的团队使用。
